title: School Support Staff Negotiating Body (SSSNB)
body: "Background  On 18 December 2025, the Employment Rights Bill received royal assent. The Act provides for the establishment of the SSSNB.  Secondary legislation will be required to commence and constitute the body in 2026.  We anticipate that school support staff will continue to be covered by their existing arrangements in the 2026 to 2027 financial year, and the first outcomes will arise from the SSSNB from the 2027 to 2028 financial year at the earliest.   Support staff make up over half the directly employed school workforce and include a wide range of roles, such as:   teaching assistants administrative staff catering staff caretakers   The body will recognise the varied and vital roles support staff undertake. In turn, it will:   support work to drive high and rising standards in schools ensure we give children the best possible life chances   The SSSNB is an important part of the government’s Plan to Make Work Pay and opportunity mission. "

taxons.title: Recruiting and managing non-teaching school staff
